content:
## English

**Yang Establishes Through Three, Yin Connects Through Eight** (陽以三立，陰以八通) is a principle from the eighteenth chapter of *Zhouyi Cantong Qi* (《周易參同契》), describing the cyclical emergence of yin and yang in the lunar cycle.

According to the text, yang rises and becomes manifest on the third day of the lunar month, when the nascent moon first appears—a moment designated as [[三日震動]] (the third day, zhen moves). Yin then becomes accessible on the eighth day, when the moon reaches its first quarter (waxing half-moon), flowing forth as described by [[八日兌行]] (the eighth day, dui proceeds). Together with [[三五德就，乾體乃成]] (three and five achieve their virtue, the pure yang body is complete), this forms a sequential account of the moon's progression from new to full, paralleled with the alchemical refinement of the elixir.

In the context of the *Zhouyi Cantong Qi*, this temporal mapping serves the practitioner in calibrating the inner work to cosmological rhythms. By aligning with these cosmic intervals—yang consolidated through the third, yin harmonized through the eighth—the cultivator enacts the [[三期迭用]] (three periods alternating in use) that produces the golden elixir. The doctrine warns against the failure to recognize these signs, admonishing that those who miss the proper timing will never achieve the supreme accomplishment.

## 中文

**陽以三立，陰以八通**，語出《周易參同契》第十八章，乃述一月之中陰陽消長之候，以明丹道火候之節序。

蓋月之晦朔，[[混沌鴻蒙]]，無形可見。及[[晦朔合符]]之後，陽氣初萌，至三日而震動，見[[三日震動]]之象，月牙始生，此陽之所以立也。陰氣漸暢，至八日而兌行，月成上弦，是[[八日兌行]]之候，此陰之所以通也。[[三五德就，乾體乃成]]，三五並言，則陽之德備，純乾乃成。此一月之候數，丹家所以法[[璇璣]]之運，循[[周流六爻]]之理者也。

修煉者法此三期迭用之義，知陽生於三、陰暢於八，以定進退之節，乃成[[金丹之功]]。若失其時，[[用九翩翩]]，則丹道不成矣。

## 日本語

**陽以三立、陰以八通**（よう いさんりつ、いん はちつう）とは、《周易參同契》第十八章に見える語であり、月の満ち欠けにおける陰陽の消長を記したものである。

月の晦朔の後、陽気が萌し始め、三日において震動し、新月の微光が初めて現れる。[[三日震動]]の象これである。陰気が次第に広がり、八日において兌動き、月は上弦に至る。[[八日兌行]]の候これである。《三五徳就、乾体乃成》とともに、月の新月から満月へと至る過程を記述し、あわせて丹道における火候の節序を示したものである。

修煉の者はこの三期迭用の道理に則り、三において陽が起き、八において陰が通ずることを知り、宇宙のリズムに合わせて-inner workを行う。
summary: A principle from Zhouyi Cantong Qi describing the timing of yang's rise on the third day and yin's emergence on the eighth day of the lunar month.
title: Yang Establishes Through Three, Yin Connects Through Eight / 陽以三立，陰以八通
